page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: INST808, LBSC802, or INST802.

Formerly: LBSC802, INST802.

INST809 Individualized Teaching Experience (3-5 Credits) Introduction to the techniques and challenges associated with design, delivery, and evaluation of couses offered at the University level. The doctoral student will work one-on-one with a faculty member in the development and co-teaching of a graduate level course. Prerequisite: Must have completed 18 credit hours of doctoral course work.
